description: Hyper-local news feeds for Tucson/Pima County
notes: Some URLs may need verification. Agent should test each feed on first run and report failures.

tier_1_primary.name: Arizona Daily Star
tier_1_primary.notes: DISABLED 2026-06-14 (trial) — the main feed is mostly national/wire/sports content and only ~2 of 25 items overlap the local feed, while its size contributed to context compaction dropping Daily Star content mid-run. Keeping only the local-news feed below. To re-enable, remove this status field. Section-specific feeds available by adding &c= parameter; headlines/summaries come through RSS even on paywalled articles.

tier_1_primary.name: Arizona Daily Star - Local News
tier_1_primary.notes: Local news section feed — more relevant than main feed for daily brief

tier_1_primary.name: Arizona Daily Star - Border
tier_1_primary.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh). Distinct border/immigration beat — on-mission for TDB's recurring ICE/border coverage. Lee section feed.

tier_1_primary.name: Arizona Daily Star - Education
tier_1_primary.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh). TUSD / school-district / U of A education beat; feeds the planned school-district coverage line. Lee section feed.

tier_1_primary.name: Arizona Daily Star - Business
tier_1_primary.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh). Local business beat. Use the news/local/business section (the bare c=business feed leans into ad/sponsored content). Lee section feed.

tier_1_primary.name: Tucson Sentinel - All News
tier_1_primary.notes: BROKEN as of 2026-04-12 — entire site is behind Cloudflare managed challenge (403 on all paths, all user agents). No RSS reader can reach this. Independent nonprofit newsroom, would be high-value if they fix it. Check periodically.

tier_1_primary.name: AZPM
tier_1_primary.notes: Arizona Public Media (PBS/NPR affiliate for Southern AZ). When a post embeds an article link (embed.external.uri), follow through to the article for full context. No auth — Bluesky public API. No working direct RSS feed exists on azpm.org (their CMS emits no RSS/sitemap; their Mastodon @azpm@mastodon.social mirrors this same Bluesky stream, so it's no fresher — Bluesky is the path). LOW-CADENCE: posts in bursts every few days, often ~4-5 days apart at the recent edge, so window_hours=120 (added 2026-06-25) gives a longer lookback than the 36h default to actually catch its bursts; limit raised 20->30 to match.

tier_1_primary.name: Arizona Luminaria
tier_1_primary.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh). Hyper-local Tucson nonprofit newsroom — original civic reporting, exactly the kind of source TDB values most. WordPress feed.

tier_1_primary.name: Tucson Spotlight
tier_1_primary.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh). Newer Tucson nonprofit newsroom, active. Ghost CMS. Note: tucsonspotlight.org/feed/ 302-redirects here — use this final www + /rss/ URL directly. Also publishes a Spanish 'El Foco' tag feed for the future Tucson en Breve fork.

tier_2_broadcast.name: KGUN 9 (ABC)
tier_2_broadcast.notes: CONFIRMED WORKING — returns valid XML. Scripps station, solid local coverage.

tier_2_broadcast.name: KVOA News 4 (NBC)
tier_2_broadcast.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh). NBC affiliate, hyper-local Tucson TV, high volume. TownNews/Lee `?f=rss` pattern. KMSB Fox 11 shares this newsroom (Allen Media) so this feed covers both.

tier_2_broadcast.name: KOLD News 13 (CBS)
tier_2_broadcast.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh). Gray Television CBS affiliate, Arc Publishing feed. Low item count per fetch (2-4) — benefits from frequent polling. Main feed (drop /category/news) adds some syndicated items.

tier_2_officials.name: Sen. Ruben Gallego
tier_2_officials.notes: Arizona's junior U.S. Senator. Promotional account — scan for official statements, policy positions, and Arizona-specific news. Not a primary news source; use for context and quotes when relevant to Tucson stories.

tier_2_officials.name: Sen. Mark Kelly
tier_2_officials.notes: Arizona's senior U.S. Senator. Promotional account — scan for official statements, policy positions, and Arizona-specific news. Not a primary news source; use for context and quotes when relevant to Tucson stories.

tier_2_institutional.name: City of Tucson - Media (GovDelivery)
tier_2_institutional.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh — newest item Jun 24 2026). Official City of Tucson press-release feed. tucsonaz.gov itself hard-403s (WAF), but the AZTUCSON GovDelivery account exposes ~40 keyless per-topic RSS feeds; topic 9 = Media. IMPORTANT: TPD and TFD have no dedicated crime/incident RSS — their press releases land in THIS feed (commingled with all City PR), so this is the best primary-source public-safety signal available. Other live topics if more granularity is wanted later: _10 Transportation, _27 Mayor & Council, _41 Tucson Water (monthly).

tier_2_institutional.name: Tucson Electric Power (TEP) - News
tier_2_institutional.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh — newest item Jun 24 2026). Dominant electric utility for the metro; catch-all news feed (press releases, community, projects, rate/outage announcements). WordPress feed. (A live outage-count JSON exists via Kubra but the data path rotates each interval, so it's not a static feed — left out of sources for now.)

tier_2_institutional.name: Sun Tran (Tucson Transit)
tier_2_institutional.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh — newest item Jun 12 2026). Official Tucson bus-system alerts and news (route closures, service changes). WordPress feed. Note: Sun Link streetcar shares this backend and is a duplicate — do not add it separately.

tier_2_institutional.name: Regional Transportation Authority (RTA Pima)
tier_2_institutional.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh — newest item Jun 24 2026). Regional transportation oversight body (road projects, ribbon-cuttings, RTA Next planning). WordPress feed. Overlaps somewhat with PAG (pagregion.com/feed/), held in reserve.

tier_2_institutional.name: University of Arizona News - Campus News
tier_2_institutional.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh — newest item Jun 16 2026). The LIVE UA news feed. Replaces the legacy news.arizona.edu/rss.xml, which is a stale 'external-news' reprints feed frozen at Apr 26 2026 — do NOT use rss.xml.

tier_2_institutional.name: University of Arizona News - Arizona & the Southwest
tier_2_institutional.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh — newest item Jun 18 2026). The most locally-relevant UA feed — desert, water, Colorado River, regional research. Pairs with the campus-news feed above.

tier_2_institutional.name: Pima County Attorney (PCAO)
tier_2_institutional.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh — newest item May 22 2026, 'Week 254'). County prosecutor's office WordPress feed. REQUIRES insecure_tls=true: the server presents an incomplete TLS chain (broken intermediate cert), so standard verification fails — generate_brief.py's fetch_rss honors this flag and passes verify=False for this source. Lower cadence (roughly weekly).

tier_3_supplemental.name: Tucson Weekly
tier_3_supplemental.notes: Alt-weekly covering politics, culture, arts. Good for longer-form local stories. Migrated to WordPress — old /tucson/Rss.xml URL dead as of 2026-04-12.

tier_3_supplemental.name: Arizona Mirror
tier_3_supplemental.notes: Nonprofit statewide politics/policy coverage. Good for legislative actions affecting Tucson.

tier_3_supplemental.name: Tucson Local Media / Explorer News
tier_3_supplemental.notes: Covers Oro Valley, Catalina, Marana — your immediate area. URL follows Lee Enterprises pattern, verify on first run.

tier_3_supplemental.name: Inside Tucson Business
tier_3_supplemental.notes: Local business news. Lee Enterprises RSS pattern. LOW-CADENCE (often >1 week between items), so window_hours=96 (added 2026-06-25) widens the lookback past the 36h default to catch its sparse posts.

tier_3_supplemental.name: Green Valley News & Sahuarita Sun
tier_3_supplemental.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh). Hyper-local Green Valley / Sahuarita — fills the SE-corridor coverage gap, supports the planned Sahuarita expansion. Lee/TownNews ?f=rss pattern.

tier_3_supplemental.name: Cronkite News (AZ PBS)
tier_3_supplemental.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh). ASU Cronkite School / Arizona PBS statewide newsroom — regular border and Tucson items. Statewide, so filter for Tucson/Pima relevance.

tier_3_supplemental.name: Nogales International
tier_3_supplemental.notes: Added 2026-06-25 (verified fresh). Santa Cruz County / border news south of Tucson. Lee/TownNews ?f=rss pattern. Filter for items with Tucson-metro relevance.

tier_4_weather_safety.name: NWS Tucson - Active Alerts (downtown point)
tier_4_weather_safety.notes: Query by POINT (downtown Tucson, 32.2217,-110.9694 — same point as the forecast source), NOT by a single zone. CORRECTED 2026-06-26: previously ?zone=AZZ504 (the public forecast zone), which structurally misses fire-weather products — Red Flag Warnings are issued for FIRE WEATHER zones (Tucson = AZZ150-154), a different zone set than public zones. The 2026-06-26 Red Flag Warning returned 0 results under zone=AZZ504 but is caught by the point query. A point query resolves ALL zones covering the spot (public + county + fire), so it catches heat warnings, flood watches, AND red flags in one call. (History: zone was also wrong before 2026-06-25 — AZZ540 = Phoenix/Buckeye.) For ATOM/RSS, alerts.weather.gov/cap/wwaatmget.php?x=AZC019 (Pima FIPS).

tier_4_weather_safety.name: NWS Tucson - Forecast Discussion
tier_4_weather_safety.notes: Area Forecast Discussion from NWS Tucson office (TWC). Good for plain-language weather outlook.

tier_4_weather_safety.name: NWS Tucson - Point Forecast (Downtown Tucson, 85701)
tier_4_weather_safety.notes: Returns metadata with links to hourly/daily forecasts for downtown Tucson (near Hotel Congress, 85701).

editorial_priorities: 1. Government actions (city council votes, county decisions, state legislation affecting Tucson)
2. Public safety (police, fire, emergency alerts, severe weather)
3. Education (TUSD, Amphitheater, Catalina Foothills, U of A)
4. Development & business (new construction, business openings/closings, economic news)
6. Weather (daily conditions, notable forecasts, seasonal patterns)

delivery.summary_style: concise wire-service prose, no fluff, lead with most important story
